IBMFG2JP00026515.title: Strong Data Analyst with SQL and BI skills
IBMFG2JP00026515.description:
Looking for a Data Analyst to join the Cyber Data Active Intelligence team. This role will partner with data engineers, security teams, and stakeholders to deliver scalable data and reporting solutions.
The analyst will work on cybersecurity data sets (e.g., threat, vulnerability, and operational telemetry) to develop metrics, support reporting, and provide insights that strengthen security posture. This role will contribute to both batch and near real-time data pipelines and help ensure data quality and usability across platforms.
 
Skills & Qualifications
•	5–8 years of experience as a SQL/Data Analyst, with strong hands-on expertise in MS SQL (querying, data manipulation, and performance optimization) 
•	Solid understanding of business domains and the ability to translate business needs into data solutions 
•	Familiarity with cybersecurity data domains (e.g., vulnerability data, threat intelligence, access logs, incident data) and how data supports security operations is a plus 
•	Proven ability to analyze moderately large and complex datasets to generate actionable insights, metrics, and operational reports 
•	Experience identifying data gaps, inconsistencies, and anomalies, particularly within security-related datasets 
•	Strong experience working with multiple data sources, including joins, views, and stored procedures, to integrate and transform data 
•	Experience building and supporting dashboards and reports using BI tools (e.g., Qlik, Tableau, Power BI, SSRS) 
•	Strong collaboration and communication skills, with the ability to work effectively with security teams, engineers, and business stakeholders 
•	Ability to quickly learn and adapt to new technologies; familiarity with the agentic AI space or experience building data agents is a plus
